name: Rose Hip Soup (Hagebuttem Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the dried rose hips and soak them in water for several hours.
2. Simmer the soaked rose hips until they are quite soft.
3. Strain the mixture to remove any solids.
4. Return the strained liquid to a boil.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (potato flour, Madeira or sherry, shredded almonds, lemon juice, and sugar) to the soup.
6. Serve with small dumplings or a spoonful of whipped cream on top of each cup.
